message:
refactor(bytes): improve buffer traits and implementations

Comprehensive improvements to the bytes module for better cancel-safety
and API ergonomics:

buf_trait.rs, buf_mut_trait.rs:
- Refine buffer trait bounds and implementations
- Better integration with cancel protocol

bytes.rs, bytes_mut.rs:
- Improve Bytes/BytesMut implementations
- Better memory handling and performance

chain.rs, limit.rs, take.rs:
- Improve buffer adapter implementations
- Better composability with async operations

These changes ensure buffer operations are properly cancel-safe and
integrate cleanly with asupersync's two-phase effect model.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
